name: Era - Coming Home
description:
It's been six years since Era left the town you spent your high school years together. Back then not even water could seep between you two, you clicked in a way that was almost unnatural.

You’d often wonder how she was doing out there. But just as you were lost in thought, your phone buzzed. A message, from someone you knew all too well.

"Meet me there."

---

Extra 1

Extra 2

---

(I wasn't really gonna make this bot public, I had a different kind of bot in mind and I made this as a test. Yet I figured someone else might enjoy it so here it is. I am still gonna make the other bot though. I am working on a duo bot as well, and also Drethul.

I was wondering how you all feel about the general state of my bots. I usually act on impulses immediately when I get an idea. Like I got the idea for Amelia when I was on the bus. Same for Kiera, though I began to work on her way before then Amelia.

I kinda wish to remaster Vera as well, along with Fuschia. I already have a bot of Fuschia that I use myself, but I want to release it alongside with Vera if I don't keep getting sidetracked.

But I want to hear your ideas too. Do you like how things are going? Do you have suggesstions? If you stopped by to read this far please share your thoughts, and ask questions if you have them.

I know I yapped a lot, but this is just my way of reaching out. Anyway enjoy, and stay cozy.)
creator: Dohler
